task: we are going to work on a very important feature that will help SKF to genuinely grow from the users and community feedback. A kind of self-improvemet feature. A workflow health check + optional pull request. That check is applied at the end of EVERY WORKFLOW. It is something I used to do manually with the prompt : "During the excution workflows used in this session, did you encountered some issues with the skf module that will need to open issues in /home/armel/Projects/OSS/bmad-module-skill-forge/_bmad-output/todo for a more robust workflow? DO NOT HALLUCINATE ISSUES IF YOU THINK EVERYTHING ALREADY WENT WELL." Go to party mode for multiple perspectives and insight. This way, we will have the best mechanism.
